emails.subject: Re: FW: NDA for Citigroup
emails.body: Re: FW: NDA for Citigroup I don't think there are conflicts although we have numerous agreements with Citicorp and Citibank entities. Does it protect their information? What are they providing re Offline? Kay C. Young Legal Specialist Enron North America Corp. 713-853-6794 Phone 713-646-3393 Fax kay.young@enron.com Tana Jones 05/02/2001 10:19 AM
